name: Baltimore Peach Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. With an electric mixer, blend the first five ingredients until smooth.
3. Spread the batter in a greased and floured 15x10 inch jelly roll pan or a 13x9 inch plus one 8 inch cake pan.
4. Sprinkle half of the cinnamon/sugar mixture lightly over the dough base.
5. Arrange peach slices by rows on top of the base.
6. Sprinkle with the remainder of the cinnamon/sugar mixture and drizzle melted butter over all.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes. For a thicker dough, omit the 8 inch cake pan and use only the 13x9 inch pan.
